stemHtml: A CB with thunderstorm has reached the mature stage. Which statement is correct?

options.a: In temperatures lower than -23°C icing is still possible.
options.b: If hail occurs, it only occurs in downdraughts.
options.c: Severe turbulence occurs in the cloud, but hardly ever below the cloud.
options.d: The freezing level in the whole cloud lies lower than outside the cloud.
